determination.appUseBoundary: No broader-canon candidate file is eligible for trusted app rendering until it has an explicit source witness, source-family/lane classification, public-rendering posture, and collation record.
determination.zeroRowPolicy: Zero-row artifacts are excluded from broader-canon completion and rendering.
determination.sourcePolicy: Do not trust broader-canon candidate text from meta.version or meta.copyright labels alone.
